a.style: font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif', serif

text.tspan: COVID-19 vaccinations vs. COVID-19 deaths, Dec 2, 2020 to Aug 12, 2024
Total vaccine doses administered per 100 people vs. daily new COVID-19 deaths per million people. All doses,
including boosters, are counted individually. Due to varying protocols and challenges in the attribution of the cause of
death, the number of confirmed deaths may not accurately represent the true number of deaths caused by COVID-19.
Daily new COVID-19 deaths per million people
Data source: World Health Organization (2024) and other sources
